nasb.text: There will be a shelter to give shade from the heat by day, and refuge and protection from the storm and the rain.

esv.text: There will be a booth for shade by day from the heat, and for a refuge and a shelter from the storm and rain.

cnv.text: 也必有亭子，日間可以使人得陰涼、避炎熱，也可以作避難時藏身之所，或作躲避狂風暴雨之處。

ccb.text: 是白日避暑的亭子，是躲避狂风暴雨的避难所和藏身处。

csbs.text: 躲避白天炎热的遮荫棚，躲避狂风暴雨的避难所和藏身处。
